## CDR Checklist

### Schematic
- [ ] All nets named
- [ ] No unconnected pins
- [ ] ERC passes with zero errors
- [ ] Power flags placed correctly

### BOM
- [ ] All components have MPN
- [ ] All components have supplier link
- [ ] Alternates listed where applicable

### Documentation
- [ ] Schematic exported as PDF
- [ ] BOM exported as CSV
- [ ] Interface definitions documented

### Review
- [ ] Schematic reviewed by second person
- [ ] BOM reviewed by second person
- [ ] All PDR findings resolved or formally deferred
